config.goal: Find an existing order in the list and update its status

milestones: App loads and shows a usable main screen (not blank, not login wall)
Screen shows a list of orders the user can browse
User has opened or selected a specific order to view its details
User sees a control (dropdown, button, etc.) to change the order status
User changes the status and the screen confirms the update
headline: found orders fast, but no feedback after saving

frictions.title: No success confirmation after status update
frictions.whyItHurts: After clicking 'Aggiorna stato' the only feedback is the silent badge change. A distracted or anxious user will wonder if the save happened and may click again or navigate away unsure.
frictions.suggestedDirection: Add a brief toast/snackbar ('Stato aggiornato') that appears for 2-3 seconds after a successful save.

frictions.title: No 'Ordini' entry in sidebar — must guess 'Kanban'
frictions.whyItHurts: The sidebar has Dashboard, Kanban, Audit — none of these labels obviously means 'order list'. A newcomer with 2 minutes of patience might try Audit or Anagrafiche first and waste time.
frictions.suggestedDirection: Rename 'Kanban' to 'Ordini' or add a sub-label like 'Kanban (lista ordini)' so the destination is obvious.

frictions.title: Workflow constraints invisible in status dropdown
frictions.whyItHurts: Only 2 states appear in the dropdown with no explanation. Users don't know whether it's a bug or intentional. If they expect to jump to CONCLUSI directly they'll be confused.
frictions.suggestedDirection: Add a small helper text under the dropdown: 'Gli stati disponibili dipendono dal flusso corrente dell'ordine.' or show all states grayed-out with tooltips.
